analytics.title: Personal Health Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Track your health indicators and trends over time

records.title: Medical DigiLocker
records.subtitle: Verified and structured digital health documents
records.searchPlaceholder: Search by doctor, hospital, diagnosis or medicine...
records.noRecords: No records found in this folder.

upload.title: Ingest Unstructured Records
upload.subtitle: OCR & Gemini Entity Extraction Pipeline
upload.fhirConversion: Converting scan into structured medical events...
upload.successDesc: Document parsed successfully. Extracted clinical summary has been written to the profile timeline.
upload.retryTitle: We could not read enough clinical detail
upload.retryDesc: No record was saved. Try a clearer scan, crop out extra background, or upload a PDF/image with sharper text.
upload.dragTitle: Drag & Drop or Click to Select
upload.dragDesc: Supports images (JPG, PNG) and PDFs of prescriptions, lab reports, and discharge summaries
upload.noFile: Please select a file before uploading.
upload.reviewDesc: Please confirm or correct the extracted values before writing to the database.

timeline.title: Health Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Chronological history of consultations, diagnoses, and medical events

qr.title: Secure Health Card
qr.subtitle: Present this code to clinical providers to securely authorize record retrieval
qr.desc: This QR code contains a secure encrypted verification token. No clinical history is stored on this card. It expires automatically in 15 minutes.
qr.nhaVerification: National Health Authority Token Verification Portal
qr.scanPrompt: Authorized clinical nodes only. Access logs are signed and recorded in citizen audit trails.

doctor.title: Clinical Provider Desk
doctor.subtitle: Secure clinic desk for doctor consultation and record entry
doctor.scanDesc: Position the patient's digital health QR code card inside the camera frame to retrieve records.
doctor.decryptingDesc: Retrieving clinical tokens and checking citizen consent status
doctor.saveBtn: Save & Sync to Lifelong Health Record
doctor.successDesc: Successfully saved to citizen digital health profile.
doctor.invalidToken: Access Denied: Expired or invalid QR code token.

govt.title: National Healthcare Operations
govt.subtitle: Anonymized public health intelligence and clinical infrastructure analytics
govt.followUpDesc: Currently pending follow-ups are monitored. Local workers scheduled for house checks.

map.title: Regional Epidemiological Heatmaps
map.subtitle: Spatial analytics and disease mapping for healthcare administrators
map.footer: Data streams are synchronized with regional electronic health record registry buffers.
